response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience with multiple programming languages and technologies, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform required for this role. While they have some C/C++ background, it is not recent or focused enough to meet the 5-10 years requirement for C++ specifically. Additionally, there is no demonstrated domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in fast-paced environments with high-performance requirements
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in technical communities
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience, though general SQL knowledge is present

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/investment banking
